data.name: Succubus Prison
data.detailed_description:
You stand outside a house on the edge of town, dragged there by a couple of guys you can't say no to without getting your kneecaps busted, and told that you were helping them to rob it. It's only three sisters who live there, they said. It's an easy score, they said.

You sneak inside and start searching the rooms, as instructed. It's dark, and even though you don't see anything worth taking, things are going smoothly so far.

Then the screaming starts.

Hide from what's hunting you. Use anything in the house to further your escape.

Every action you take will affect how your story evolves. Do your best to survive.

An Escape-Room Horror Game

Sneak, hide, and use the environment to survive long enough to escape.

Hand-Drawn Art

With beautiful hand-drawn art of the unique characters from a number of guest artists! Do you recognize them all?

Every action you take will affect how your story evolves. Do your best to survive.

Hand-Drawn Art

With beautiful hand-drawn art of the unique characters from a number of guest artists! Do you recognize them all?
data.short_description: You've been dragged into robbing a house by a couple of thugs, but what you discover there is beyond anything you could have imagined.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Tokinokogiri, All Rights Reserved.
